nasb.text: but I say to you that everyone who looks at a woman with lust for her has already committed adultery with her in his heart.

esv.text: But I say to you that everyone who looks at a woman with lustful intent has already committed adultery with her in his heart.

cnv.text: 可是我告訴你們，凡是看見婦女就動淫念的，心裡已經犯了姦淫。

ccb.text: 但我告诉你们，凡看见妇女就动淫念的，他在心里已经犯了通奸罪。

csbs.text: 但是我告诉你们：所有怀着欲念看女人的，就已经在心里和她通奸了。
